description: Escape to the breathtaking Amalfi Coast, where the azure waters kiss the rugged cliffs and charming villages dot the landscape. This 6-day romantic getaway is designed for couples seeking to immerse themselves in stunning scenery, delectable cuisine, and the enchanting atmosphere of this UNESCO World Heritage site. Picture yourself driving along the coastal roads, with the sun setting over the Mediterranean, while indulging in the finest pasta dishes at local trattorias. Each day unfolds like a postcard, inviting you to explore hidden gems and savor the essence of Italian coastal living.

activities.description: Start your Amalfi adventure with a delightful lunch at Da Gemma, a renowned restaurant famous for its fresh seafood pasta and local flavors. Enjoy the charming ambiance and the view of the bustling Amalfi streets.
After lunch, stroll over to the stunning Amalfi Cathedral, a masterpiece of medieval architecture. Don't miss the beautiful mosaics and the serene cloister, perfect for a romantic photo opportunity.
Wander through the picturesque streets of Amalfi Town, filled with charming shops and cafes. Take your time to soak in the vibrant atmosphere and perhaps pick up some local limoncello as a souvenir.
Indulge in a romantic dinner at Trattoria Da Lorenzo, known for its homemade pasta and local dishes. The cozy setting and attentive service make it a perfect spot for couples.

activities.activity: Evening stroll along the Amalfi Coast
activities.description: End your day with a leisurely evening stroll along the Amalfi Coast. The sunset views over the Mediterranean are breathtaking and create a perfect romantic atmosphere.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Pasticceria Pansa, famous for its fresh pastries and rich Italian coffee. Enjoy a sfogliatella or a cornetto while soaking in the charming atmosphere of Amalfi.
Explore the stunning Amalfi Cathedral, a masterpiece of medieval architecture. Don't miss the beautiful façade and the serene cloister, perfect for a romantic stroll.
Savor authentic Italian pasta dishes at Trattoria Da Gemma, known for its homemade pasta and local seafood. The terrace offers a lovely view of the bustling Amalfi streets.
Take a scenic drive along the Amalfi Coast to Ravello, where breathtaking views await. The winding roads offer stunning vistas of the coastline and the Mediterranean Sea.
Discover the enchanting Villa Rufolo, famous for its beautiful gardens and panoramic views of the coast. The villa's architecture and lush surroundings create a romantic atmosphere.
Stroll through the gardens of Villa Cimbrone, known for its stunning terrace overlooking the sea. This hidden gem is perfect for capturing memorable photos together.
Take a break at Caffè Calce, a cozy café in Ravello. Enjoy a cup of espresso or a refreshing granita while admiring the beautiful surroundings.
Drive back to Amalfi as the sun begins to set, painting the sky with beautiful colors. This drive is a perfect way to end your day, filled with romance and scenic beauty.
Enjoy a romantic dinner at Ristorante Marina Grande, known for its seafood pasta and stunning views of the Amalfi coastline. The ambiance is perfect for a couple's evening.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Pasticceria Pansa, famous for its fresh pastries and rich Italian coffee. Enjoy a cornetto filled with cream or jam, paired with a cappuccino, while soaking in the charming Amalfi atmosphere.

Set off on a scenic drive along the breathtaking Amalfi Coast. The winding roads offer stunning views of the cliffs and the sparkling Mediterranean Sea. Stop at various viewpoints to capture the beauty of this UNESCO World Heritage site.

Arrive at Positano and head straight to the famous Positano Beach. Relax on the sandy shores, take a dip in the crystal-clear waters, or simply enjoy the picturesque views of the colorful cliffside houses.

Indulge in a delicious seafood pasta at Chez Black, a beachfront restaurant known for its fresh ingredients and stunning views. Try their spaghetti alle vongole (spaghetti with clams) for a true taste of the coast.
Stroll along Spiaggia Grande, the main beach of Positano. Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere, browse local shops, and perhaps grab a gelato as you take in the stunning coastal scenery.

activities.activity: Hike the Path of the Gods
activities.description: For a bit of adventure, embark on a hike along the famous Path of the Gods. This trail offers breathtaking panoramic views of the coastline and is a perfect way to experience the natural beauty of the area. Make sure to wear comfortable shoes!
End your day with a romantic dinner at La Sponda, located in Le Sirenuse Hotel. Enjoy exquisite Italian cuisine while overlooking the twinkling lights of Positano as the sun sets over the horizon.

After a day filled with beautiful sights and delicious food, check in to Hotel Le Sirenuse, a luxurious hotel offering stunning views and top-notch amenities. Relax and unwind in your elegant room, ready for another day of exploration tomorrow.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at Casa e Bottega, known for its fresh, organic ingredients and beautiful presentation. Enjoy a healthy smoothie bowl or a classic Italian pastry with a view of the stunning coastline.

Spend a relaxing morning at Fornillo Beach, a charming and less crowded spot compared to the main beach. Take a leisurely swim in the crystal-clear waters or simply soak up the sun on the soft sand while enjoying the picturesque views of the cliffs.

Savor a delicious lunch at Trattoria da Vincenzo, a local favorite known for its homemade pasta and fresh seafood dishes. The cozy atmosphere and friendly service make it a perfect spot for a romantic meal.

Stroll through the charming streets of Positano and explore the local shops. Discover unique handmade ceramics, stylish beachwear, and artisanal products that make perfect souvenirs. Don't forget to take in the vibrant colors of the buildings and flowers along the way.

activities.activity: Gelato at Gelateria Buca di Bacco
activities.description: Treat yourselves to some of the best gelato in Positano at Gelateria Buca di Bacco. Choose from a variety of flavors, including local specialties like lemon and pistachio, while enjoying the stunning views of the sea.

End your day by watching the sunset at the beach. Find a cozy spot on the sand, sip on a refreshing drink, and enjoy the breathtaking views as the sun dips below the horizon, painting the sky in hues of orange and pink.

For dinner, head to La Pergola, a romantic restaurant with a terrace overlooking the sea. Indulge in exquisite Italian dishes, including fresh seafood and homemade pasta, while enjoying the enchanting ambiance of the Amalfi Coast.

transit.memo: Take a scenic ferry ride from Positano to Capri.

activities.description: Experience the magical Blue Grotto, where sunlight creates a stunning blue reflection in the water. Be prepared for a short boat ride to enter this natural wonder!
Enjoy a delicious meal at Da Paolino, famous for its lemon tree-covered terrace and fresh seafood pasta. A perfect spot to savor the flavors of Capri!
Stroll through the charming streets of Anacapri, visiting local shops and enjoying breathtaking views of the island. Don't miss the chance to take the chairlift to Monte Solaro for panoramic vistas!
Take the ferry back to Positano, enjoying the stunning coastal views as you travel. This is a great time to relax and reflect on your day in Capri.
End your day with a romantic dinner at La Pergola, where you can indulge in exquisite Italian cuisine while overlooking the beautiful coastline of Positano.

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic drive along the Amalfi Coast.

activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Casa e Bottega, known for its fresh, local ingredients and healthy options. The vibrant atmosphere and beautiful decor make it a perfect spot to enjoy a leisurely meal before your drive.

Visit the stunning Amalfi Cathedral, a masterpiece of medieval architecture. The intricate facade and beautiful interior are a must-see, and you can climb the steps for a breathtaking view of the town below.
Indulge in a traditional Italian lunch at Trattoria Da Gemma, famous for its homemade pasta and local seafood dishes. The charming ambiance and friendly service will enhance your dining experience.

Take a leisurely stroll through the local markets of Amalfi, where you can find fresh produce, handmade crafts, and local delicacies. It's a great opportunity to pick up some souvenirs and experience the local culture.

Enjoy a scenic drive along the Amalfi Coast, taking in the breathtaking views of the cliffs and the sparkling Mediterranean Sea. Stop at picturesque towns like Ravello or Minori for photo opportunities and to soak in the beauty of the coast.

End your day with a romantic dinner at Ristorante Il Capitano, offering stunning views of the coast and a menu filled with delicious seafood and pasta dishes. It's the perfect way to savor your last evening in this beautiful region.
